name: extraction-workflow
description: Machine-readable extraction workflow definition — multi-engine extraction with deterministic fallback, retry, and normalization.

url.description: Target URL to extract product details from

steps.name: Receive Extraction Request
steps.description: Parse incoming extraction request, validate URL, extract options

steps.name: Select Primary Engine
steps.description: Select Chrome DevTools MCP as primary engine per engine-priority policy

steps.name: Attempt Extraction
steps.description: Execute extraction with selected engine, apply timeout, capture result

steps.name: Detect Failure Type
steps.description: Categorize failure as network, timeout, parsing, rate-limit, or unknown

steps.name: Apply Retry Policy
steps.description: Retry with exponential backoff per retry-policy.json extractionEngines rules

steps.name: Execute Recovery Switching
steps.description: Switch to next engine in priority chain (Chrome DevTools → JCodesMore → Firecrawl)

steps.name: Normalize Extraction Output
steps.description: Transform raw HTML to standardized ExtractedProduct format using DOM extraction and heuristic normalization

steps.name: Validate Quality and Store
steps.description: Validate extraction quality per quality-policy.json, store product in SQLite, record metrics
